cmd:
set -e
mkdir -p /root/eks_run
cd /root/Iryna_Karmazina
git fetch -q origin claude/expeditor-automated-invoices-bdvl3o
rm -rf /root/eks_run/ekspedytor
git archive origin/claude/expeditor-automated-invoices-bdvl3o ekspedytor | tar -x -C /root/eks_run/
cat > /root/eks_run/invoices.b64 <<'B64'

B64
base64 -d /root/eks_run/invoices.b64 > /root/eks_run/invoices.xlsx && rm /root/eks_run/invoices.b64
echo "FILES:"; ls -la /root/eks_run/ekspedytor
echo "IMPORT:"; cd /root/eks_run && /root/Iryna_Karmazina/venv/bin/python -c "import ekspedytor.agent, ekspedytor.invoices; print('import OK')" 2>&1
echo "READ:"; /root/Iryna_Karmazina/venv/bin/python -m ekspedytor.invoices /root/eks_run/invoices.xlsx 2>&1 | head -3
